utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six sections. Each section is fully specified with all required details: the property has address, type, features, status, and price; financing includes method, funding sources, and mortgage terms; legal_services specifies provider, scope, cost, and status; moving_services includes provider, services, timeline, cost, and status; setup_services provides utilities and optional services with status; and total_budget provides a clear cost breakdown. Therefore, all six items are covered and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property described as 'Millcroft Gardens Condo, 3120 Walkers Line, Unit 204, Burlington, ON', a 2-bedroom accessible condo priced at CAD 700,000, within the user’s target budget of 650K–750K. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest match in type and price is the 'Luxury Condo' from the ideal_real_estate_profile (CAD 720K, rating 10), since it is a condo with accessibility features and low-maintenance living fitting retirees’ needs. Financing chosen was a 'Full cash purchase,' which corresponds to 'Cash Purchase' in purchase_financing (rating 10). Legal services selected involved a local Burlington law firm handling title transfer and closing, matching the 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9) as it includes comprehensive due diligence and property survey. The moving provider 'MapleLeaf Relocation' offers packing, unpacking, and organizing, aligning with 'Premium Moving' (rating 10) for seniors. Utility setup is listed as essential transfers of electricity, water, gas, and internet, aligning best with 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6) since it covers essentials without premium automation. Therefore, the corresponding ratings are drawn from their closest ground-truth matches.
